title: Isabella Bath Set, Pink, Purple
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes a pink bathtub, baby doll with bunny-themed striped outfit, rubber duck toy, and pink bath accessories for imaginative playtime
BATH ACCESSORIES: Features multiple pink bath accessories including feeding bottles and bath dishes to enhance the bathing experience
DOLL FEATURES: Soft-bodied doll dressed in an adorable striped outfit with bunny design and matching headband
INTERACTIVE PLAY: Bath time playset encourages nurturing play and helps develop caring skills through role-play activities
PACKAGING: Comes in an attractive display box with 'Bath Time' theme, perfect for gifting and storage
description: Product Description Make bath time a delightful experience with the Mybaby Isabella Bath Set from A to Z. This charming playset includes everything needed for imaginative bathing fun. The set features a spacious pink bathtub, perfect for pretend bath time adventures. The doll comes dressed in an adorable striped outfit with bunny details and a matching head covering. The set includes engaging bath accessories like a cheerful yellow rubber duck and pink bath items to enhance creative play. The practical pink feeding dish and other accessories add to the nurturing play experience. This bath set is ideal for young children who enjoy role-play activities and caring for their dolls. The bright colours and engaging accessories make this set an entertaining choice for imaginative play. The complete set comes attractively packaged in a pink box with bubble designs, making it a wonderful gift option for young children who love caring for their dolls. Safety Warning Warning : Not Suitable for Children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
